---
title: "Dozierende"
---

+--------------------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------------+
|                                      | Name                        | E-Mail                            |
+======================================+=============================+===================================+
| ![](images/logo_bg.png){width="166"} | Björn Braunstein            | braunstein\[at\]dshs-koeln.de     |
|                                      |                             |                                   |
|                                      | Dozent                      |                                   |
+--------------------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------------+
| ![](images/logo_bg.png){width="166"} | Simon Nolte                 | s.nolte\[at\]dshs-koeln.de        |
|                                      |                             |                                   |
|                                      | Dozent, Modulleiter         |                                   |
+--------------------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------------+
| ![](images/logo_bg.png){width="166"} | Robert Rein                 | r.rein\[at\]dshs-koeln.de         |
|                                      |                             |                                   |
|                                      | Dozent                      |                                   |
+--------------------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------------+
| ![](images/logo_bg.png){width="166"} | Chiara Heisel               |                                   |
|                                      |                             |                                   |
|                                      | Wissenschaftliche Hilfskraft|                                   |
+--------------------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------------+
